methods.description: This method involves extracting DNA from tissue samples and amplifying specific mitochondrial genes using PCR for sequencing. It is used to analyze genetic variation across different populations of a species.

steps.description: DNA was extracted from tissue samples using the DNeasy Tissue kit (QIAGEN).
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA from tissue samples using DNeasy Tissue kit

steps.description: The cytochrome b (cytb), cytochrome c oxidase subunit I and II (COI and COII), NADH dehydrogenase subunit 2 and 6 (ND 2 and ND 6), ATP synthetase subunit 8 (ATP 8) and control region (CR) genes were amplified via the polymerase chain reaction (PCR).
The same primers were used for amplification and sequencing reactions.
steps.searchable_summary: use same primers for amplification and sequencing

steps.description: Methods of purification and sequencing were as described in Qu et al.
steps.searchable_summary: purify and sequence DNA as per Qu et al.

steps.description: All sequences are accessible at GenBank (Accession nos: HM601543-602022).
